title: State Dept support for 2002 TV series "The American Embassy"

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All documents pertaining to collaboration between the U.S. Department of State and the production of the 2002 TV series "The American Embassy," created by James D. Parriott. Such documents may include but should not be limited to: script notes; production assistance agreements; photographs; and all records of communications between employees of the State Dept. and members of the cast, crew, and production company of "The American Embassy," including memos, notes of meetings and conference calls, emails, and other forms of communication.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Brett Carollo

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

All emails received by any CPD email address from the sender, p.vitaioli@comcast.net, scope-limited to Jan 1, 2020 through the present date.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

LPL

communications.subject: Michigan Freedom of Information Act Request: CoC Inspection Reports
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Michigan Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Certificate of Compliance inspection reports for the following addresses:

-- River Pointe Tower (800 Dickerson Ave)
-- Cortez Apartments (329 & 381 Holbrook)
-- The Travel Inn (11560 Harper)

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Aaron Mondry

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: 47QFNA23F0056
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All invoices, purchases orders, contracts, loan agreements, statements of work, procurement documents (but not limited to solicitation documents or notices of proposed contracts, proposed bids, unsolicited proposals, and/or documents justifying contracting without full and open competition) relating to the following specific procurement identifiers:

47QFNA23F0056
47QFNA20D0002

This request is not being made for commercial purposes. Any documents obtained from this request will be used in the course of reporting for The Latino Newsletter, a new media outlet that focuses on Latinx issues in the United States (https://thelatinonewsletter.org/)

Army funding office is W6DT PEO AMMO, per FPDS.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Carlos Berríos Polanco
